subject: [PATCH v4 5/8] mm: list_lru: introduce caller locking for additions and deletions

2026-05-21.patch_summary: This patch introduces caller locking for additions and deletions in the list_lru API, allowing callers to synchronize auxiliary state with LRU state. It provides normal and irqsafe locking primitives as well as caller-locked variants of addition and deletion functions. The goal is to enable the THP shrinker to switch from its custom LRU to the list_lru implementation while keeping PG_partially_mapped and vmstats consistent.
